title.rendered: Industrial Sheds in Bangalore: Types, Sizes, Cost Drivers and Factory-Direct Build

content.rendered:
An industrial shed in Bangalore is the working envelope behind most factories, godowns and workshops in the city — a clear-span steel structure that gives you covered, column-free floor space for production, storage or assembly. SAMAN Portable builds these sheds in-house at our Gopasandra plant in Bengaluru 560099 and delivers them ready to erect across the city, from IS 2062 structural steel. This page explains the shed types we make, how to size one, what actually drives the cost, and how a factory-direct shed differs from a generic supplier listing.

SAMAN POS India Private Limited has served Indian buyers since 2009 (incorporated as SAMAN POS India Private Limited in 2019). We are an ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturer with 500+ projects delivered — so the shed you buy is fabricated and backed by the people who make it, not brokered from a directory.

The 9 industrial shed types SAMAN builds

“Industrial shed” is a broad term. The right structure depends on what goes inside and how long it stays. Our range covers nine distinct types, so you match the building to the job rather than forcing one design to do everything:

  • Garden sheds — small covered units for tools, equipment and light storage.
  • Storage sheds — enclosed space for inventory, raw material and finished goods.
  • Portable sheds — relocatable units for sites that move or lease the land.
  • Steel sheds — bare or sheet-clad steel structures for workshops and bulk cover.
  • Prefabricated industrial sheds — factory-built, bolted on site, insulated and relocatable for production use.
  • Prefab steel houses — steel-framed habitable or office units within an industrial plot.
  • Prefabricated warehouses — taller clear-height spans built for pallet racking and bulk storage.
  • Commercial sheds — customer-facing buildings where the shed is part of the storefront.
  • Industrial sheds (flagship) — our standard production-grade shed for factory and manufacturing floors.

You can compare all nine on the industrial shed range page, where each model shows its standard configuration. Every type is made to order — span, length, height, door and window positions, and cladding are set to your brief.

How much does an industrial shed cost in Bangalore?

There is no single rate per square foot. The cost of an industrial shed moves with the structure you actually need: a plain sheet-clad storage span costs far less per square foot than an insulated production shed of the same footprint. Quote your plot size, clear height and use, and we price it against that — never a flat figure.

The very low per-square-foot figures advertised online are usually for a bare steel skeleton with sheet cladding — before insulated panels, doors, flooring and on-site erection. So they rarely reflect the finished, usable building. The honest way to read a shed quote is by its cost drivers:

  • Span and clear height — wider column-free spans and taller eave heights need more steel tonnage.
  • Cladding type — bare GI sheeting is cheapest; insulated PUF sandwich panels cost more but control heat and weather.
  • Foundation and civil work — plinth, flooring and footings depend on your soil and load.
  • Openings and add-ons — rolling shutters, doors, windows, ventilators, mezzanines.
  • Site and access — location, transport distance and crane access affect erection.

For a real number tied to your plot, send your footprint and use through our prefabricated industrial shed page or call the team directly — see the contact section below.

Sizes, spans and clear height — sizing the shed to your use

Two numbers decide most of a shed’s design: the span (the column-free width) and the clear height under the roof. Get these right and the rest follows. As a practical guide from units we build:

  • A compact production or workshop shed such as a 10 × 20 ft footprint with around 14 ft clear height suits machinery, assembly or a site office-cum-store.
  • A storage or warehouse span such as 50 × 20 ft with ~1,000 sq ft of floor and 14 ft clear height supports two to three levels of pallet racking — see our prefabricated warehouse for that configuration.
  • Larger clear-span factory floors are built to your drawing, with eave height set to your crane, racking or machine requirement.

If you are unsure, tell us the equipment, racking or vehicle that has to fit inside and we work the span and height back from that.

Use cases — warehouse, factory, storage and workshop

The same steel shed serves very different buyers in and around Bangalore:

  • Warehousing and godowns — tall, insulated clear-span sheds for pallet racking and bulk goods.
  • Manufacturing and production — wide-span factory floors with the eave height set for machines and material flow.
  • Storage and raw material — enclosed, lockable cover that keeps stock dry and secure.
  • Workshops and fabrication — robust, ventilated steel sheds for engineering and repair work.
  • Commercial and customer-facing — finished sheds where appearance matters as much as function.

How SAMAN builds it — IS 2062 steel, MS frame and cladding

What separates a manufacturer-built shed from a directory listing is in the build, not the brochure. Every SAMAN industrial shed is fabricated in-house, so we control the specification end to end:

  • Structural steel to IS 2062 — the Indian standard for structural steel, used for the main frame and base members.
  • Engineered MS frame — mild-steel columns, rafters and bracing sized to your span, height and load, not a one-size template.
  • Cladding choice — GI steel sheeting for economical cover, or insulated PUF sandwich panels where you need to control heat, noise and weather.
  • Factory-built, bolted on site — components are made at our plant and assembled on your plot, which keeps quality consistent and erection quick.

Because fabrication is ours, customisation is normal: span, length, eave height, opening positions and wall/roof cladding are all configured to your requirement rather than fixed.

Build, delivery and installation across Bangalore

Sheds are fabricated at our Gopasandra plant, Bengaluru 560099 and delivered to your site across Bangalore and the surrounding region for on-site erection. Smaller sheds ship faster; larger clear-span warehouses and factory structures typically fall in a 30–60 day window depending on size, cladding and site readiness. We confirm a fabrication-and-erection timeline against your site once the configuration is locked. Working hours are Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM (Sunday closed).

Why buy from a manufacturer, not a directory listing

Most “industrial shed in Bangalore” results are directory or classified pages that pass your enquiry to whoever pays for the slot. Buying factory-direct from SAMAN gives you proof a listing cannot:

  • A real factory address — Gopasandra, Bengaluru 560099, where the shed is actually made.
  • ISO 9001:2015 quality management, with Udyam, Startup India, ZED and NSIC (OEM by NSIC) registrations.
  • IS 2062 structural steel and an engineered frame, not unspecified material.
  • 500+ projects delivered and a 7-day return window from delivery or installation.
  • A clear warranty position: 5 years structural frame and base + 1–2 years finishing + 20–25 years engineered service life.

(The 20–25 years is the engineered service life of the structure — a design-life figure, not a warranty.)

Frequently asked questions

How much does an industrial shed cost in Bangalore?

There is no single per-square-foot rate. Cost depends on span, clear height, cladding (bare sheet vs insulated panel), foundation and openings. A plain storage span costs less than an insulated production shed of the same size. Send your plot size and use for a figure tied to your site.

What size and clear height do I need?

Work it back from what goes inside. Tell us the machines, racking or vehicles that must fit, and we set the span (column-free width) and eave height around them — from compact 10 × 20 ft workshops to wide clear-span factory floors.

Industrial shed, PEB construction or a prefab building — which do I need?

An industrial shed is a single-span steel structure bought as a finished product. A large engineered building designed, supplied and erected as a turnkey project is PEB construction. A finished, multi-room building is a prefab building. For a standalone steel shed, this is the right page.

Should I choose GI sheet or insulated PUF panel cladding?

GI steel sheeting is the economical choice for cover and storage. Insulated PUF sandwich panels cost more but control heat, condensation and noise — worth it for production, temperature-sensitive goods or staff comfort.

Do you deliver and install across Bangalore, and how long does it take?

Yes. Sheds are built at our Gopasandra (Bengaluru 560099) plant and erected on your site across the city. Smaller sheds ship quickly; larger spans are typically 30–60 days depending on size, cladding and site readiness.

What warranty comes with a SAMAN industrial shed?

5 years structural frame and base + 1–2 years finishing + 20–25 years engineered service life. The 20–25 years is the structure’s engineered service life, not a warranty period.

Talk to the manufacturer

For an industrial shed quote tied to your plot and use in Bangalore, talk to our team directly. Share your footprint, clear height and what the shed is for, and we will work the span, cladding and timeline back from that.

Bangalore: Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM–8:00 PM (Sunday closed). Browse the full industrial shed range to see standard configurations before you enquire.

excerpt.rendered: Looking for industrial sheds in Bangalore? Our top-quality sheds provide affordable, durable, and customizable solutions for your business needs. Boost your operational efficiency with our expert designs and advanced features.

author.name: Aman Dubey
author.description: Aman Dubey is the lead marketing and copywriting expert at Saman Portable, specializing in prefabricated, shipping-container, and modular structures. With over 15 years of industry experience, Aman has helped global clients optimize design, streamline production, and amplify brand visibility through data-driven content and strategic SEO. Under his guidance, Saman Portable has become a trusted name in container office solutions and turnkey prefabricated buildings across India and beyond.

caption.rendered: A factory-built industrial shed delivered ready to erect on an industrial plot near Bangalore.

wp:featuredmedia.alt_text: New prefabricated industrial steel shed on a Bangalore industrial plot with rolling shutter and delivery truck
